title: Kangaroo Level 3-4 - Arithmetic Drill
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: What is 37 + 48?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 140 60' width='140' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>37 + 48 = ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Text expression 37 plus 48 equals question mark.
questions.solution: Add tens and ones: 30+40=70 and 7+8=15, so 70+15=85.

questions.question_text: Mia has 6 bags with 7 marbles in each bag. How many marbles does she have in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 60' width='200' height='60'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='15' width='24' height='32'/><rect x='40' y='15' width='24' height='32'/><rect x='70' y='15' width='24' height='32'/><rect x='100' y='15' width='24' height='32'/><rect x='130' y='15' width='24' height='32'/><rect x='160' y='15' width='24' height='32'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Six identical bag rectangles in a row.

questions.question_text: Calculate 100 minus 37.
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 140 60' width='140' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='24' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>100 - 37</text></svg>

questions.question_text: A pack contains 24 stickers. If Luca shares them equally among 4 friends, how many stickers does each friend get?
Evaluate 9 + 9 + 9 + 9.
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 60' width='180' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>9 + 9 + 9 + 9</text></svg>

questions.question_text: Tomas buys 3 notebooks that cost 5 dollars each. How many dollars does he pay in total?
What number is 12 less than 50?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 60' width='220' height='60'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><line x1='10' y1='30' x2='210' y2='30'/><line x1='10' y1='25' x2='10' y2='35'/><line x1='210' y1='25' x2='210' y2='35'/><line x1='158' y1='25' x2='158' y2='35'/></g><text x='5' y='52' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>0</text><text x='150' y='52' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>?</text><text x='200' y='52' font-size='12' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>50</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Number line from 0 to 50 with an unknown mark before 50.

questions.question_text: What is the product of 8 and 7?
Anna has 45 candies. She gives 18 to her brother and then eats 7 herself. How many candies does she have left?
What is the value of 6 times 8, minus 13?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 60' width='180' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>6 x 8 - 13</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Expression six times eight minus thirteen.

questions.question_text: A box contains 4 rows of 9 chocolates. If 5 chocolates are eaten, how many remain in the box?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 100' width='200' height='100'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='40' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='60' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='80' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='100' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='140' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='160' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='180' cy='20' r='7'/><circle cx='20' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='80' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='140' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='180' cy='40' r='7'/><circle cx='20' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='40' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='60' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='100' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='140' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='160' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='180' cy='60' r='7'/><circle cx='20' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='40' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='60' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='80' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='140' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='160' cy='80' r='7'/><circle cx='180' cy='80' r='7'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Grid of chocolates, 4 rows by 9 columns.

questions.question_text: What number, when multiplied by 7, gives 63?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 60' width='180' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>? x 7 = 63</text></svg>

questions.question_text: Pedro saves 8 dollars every week. How many dollars will he have saved after 9 weeks?
Evaluate 125 + 68 - 43.
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 60' width='220' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>125 + 68 - 43</text></svg>

questions.question_text: A school bus holds 32 students. If 3 buses are full, how many students are there altogether?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 70' width='260' height='70'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='15' width='60' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='25' cy='52' r='5'/><circle cx='55' cy='52' r='5'/><rect x='90' y='15' width='60' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='105' cy='52' r='5'/><circle cx='135' cy='52' r='5'/><rect x='170' y='15' width='60' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='185' cy='52' r='5'/><circle cx='215' cy='52' r='5'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Three simple bus shapes in a row.

questions.question_text: Find the result of 72 divided by 8, then add 6.
Clara has 3 boxes of pencils with 12 pencils in each box. She gives 14 pencils to her classmates. How many pencils does she have left?
Compute 5 times 6 plus 4 times 7.
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' width='240' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>5 x 6 + 4 x 7</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Expression five times six plus four times seven.
questions.solution: 5 times 6 equals 30; 4 times 7 equals 28; 30 plus 28 equals 58.

questions.question_text: A farmer has 84 eggs. He packs them into cartons that hold 6 eggs each. How many full cartons does he fill?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 60' width='200' height='60'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='15' width='70' height='32' rx='3'/><circle cx='22' cy='25' r='3'/><circle cx='34' cy='25' r='3'/><circle cx='46' cy='25' r='3'/><circle cx='22' cy='37' r='3'/><circle cx='34' cy='37' r='3'/><circle cx='46' cy='37' r='3'/></g><text x='100' y='37' font-size='14' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>84 eggs</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Carton with six eggs alongside the label 84 eggs.

questions.question_text: The sum of two numbers is 48. The larger number is 3 times the smaller number. What is the larger number?
questions.solution: Let the smaller be x, then larger is 3x. So x plus 3x equals 4x equals 48, giving x equals 12. The larger is 3 times 12 equals 36.

questions.question_text: Sofia reads 15 pages every day. How many pages will she read in 2 weeks?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 90' width='200' height='90'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='20' y='15' width='50' height='60'/><line x1='20' y1='25' x2='70' y2='25'/><rect x='100' y='15' width='50' height='60'/><line x1='100' y1='25' x2='150' y2='25'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Two simple book icons side by side.
questions.solution: Two weeks is 14 days; 14 times 15 equals 210 pages.

questions.question_text: A ticket costs 7 dollars. A group of 9 people buys tickets together and pays with a 100-dollar bill. How many dollars of change do they receive?
What is the result of 100 - 4 times 9 + 5?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 60' width='260' height='60'><text x='10' y='40' font-size='22' fill='currentColor' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0'>100 - 4 x 9 + 5</text></svg>
questions.solution: Multiply first: 4 times 9 equals 36. Then 100 minus 36 equals 64, and 64 plus 5 equals 69.

questions.question_text: Three friends share 96 stickers equally. One of them then gives 5 stickers to her sister. How many stickers does that friend have left?
